examples:
<sqf>
if (isLocalized "STR_USRACT_ADJUST") then 
{
	hint localize "STR_USRACT_ADJUST";
} 
else 
{
	hint "STR_USRACT_ADJUST";
	diag_log "ToDo: STR_USRACT_ADJUST is not localized";
};
</sqf>
name: isLocalized

Item.desc: string which leads to localisation. Casing does not matter. Since Arma 3 v2.04 a string starting with {{hl|"$"}} is supported as well
Item.name: stringName
